summary: Build NYC's projected job-growth figures track how many financing deals it closes each year. Fiscal 2024's dip to 80 jobs came after Build NYC closed only 6 contracts, down from 13 in Fiscal 2023, a slowdown EDC attributed to the high-interest-rate environment discouraging bond financings; Fiscal 2025's rebound to 396 jobs followed a larger slate of deals, including bonds for a JFK Airport cargo facility and the 92nd Street Y's renovation.
